title: Oman: What began as road construction reveals 3,000-year-old graves and rare Iron Age burial rituals
summary_full: Construction in Oman's Al Batinah region unearthed nearly 3,000-year-old Iron Age graves, revealing a structured cemetery with skeletal remains and grave goods. The discovery offers insights into ancient burial traditions, social status, and Oman's historical role as a vital trade crossroads.
